inputs.label: Steam Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Mass flow rate of steam generated by the boiler, measured in kilograms per hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass flow rate of steam generated by the boiler, measured in kilograms per hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazan tarafından üretilen buharın kütle akış hızı, kilogram/saat cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Massenstrom des vom Kessel erzeugten Dampfes, gemessen in Kilogramm pro Stunde.

inputs.label: Steam Enthalpy
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy of the steam at the boiler outlet, typically from steam tables based on pressure and temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy of the steam at the boiler outlet, typically from steam tables based on pressure and temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazan çıkışındaki buharın özgül entalpisi, genellikle basınç ve sıcaklığa bağlı buhar tablolarından alınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Enthalpie des Dampfes am Kesselauslass, typischerweise aus Dampftafeln basierend auf Druck und Temperatur.

inputs.label: Feed Water Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of feed water entering the boiler, used to calculate feed water enthalpy (approx. 4.186 × T°C kJ/kg).

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of feed water entering the boiler, used to calculate feed water enthalpy (approx. 4.186 × T°C kJ/kg).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazana giren besleme suyunun sıcaklığı, besleme suyu entalpisini hesaplamak için kullanılır (yaklaşık 4.186 × T°C kJ/kg).
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur des in den Kessel eintretenden Speisewassers, zur Berechnung der Speisewasserenthalpie (ca. 4,186 × T°C kJ/kg).

inputs.label: Fuel Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Mass flow rate of fuel consumed by the boiler, measured in kilograms per hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass flow rate of fuel consumed by the boiler, measured in kilograms per hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazan tarafından tüketilen yakıtın kütle akış hızı, kilogram/saat cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Massenstrom des vom Kessel verbrauchten Brennstoffs, gemessen in Kilogramm pro Stunde.

inputs.label: Fuel Gross Calorific Value
inputs.businessContext: Gross calorific value (higher heating value) of the fuel, representing total energy released per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross calorific value (higher heating value) of the fuel, representing total energy released per kilogram.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıtın brüt ısıl değeri (üst ısıl değer), kilogram başına salınan toplam enerjiyi temsil eder.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brutto-Heizwert (oberer Heizwert) des Brennstoffs, der die gesamte freigesetzte Energie pro Kilogramm darstellt.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
